use_cases: Displaying product image galleries on e-commerce product pages
Showcasing portfolio or work samples in creative portfolios
Presenting testimonial images or team photos
Rotating featured content banners on landing pages
Creating visual storytelling sequences for marketing campaigns
ai_summary: An image slider component for cycling through a collection of images with smooth transitions. Features a clean flat design with minimalist styling that works across both desktop and mobile platforms. Suitable for showcasing product galleries, portfolio work, testimonials, or featured content in any visual-heavy application.
